children.heading: Ownership interest of members in risk retention groups
children.label: a Ownership interest of members in risk retention groups

children.text: considered to be exempted securities for purposes of section 5 of the Securities Act of 1933 [] and for purposes of section 12 of the Securities Exchange Act of 1934 []; and15 U.S.C. 77e15 U.S.C. 78l

considered to be securities for purposes of the provisions of section 17 of the Securities Act of 1933 [] and the provisions of section 10 of the Securities Exchange Act of 1934 [].15 U.S.C. 77q15 U.S.C. 78j

children.heading: Investment companies
children.label: b Investment companies
children.text: A risk retention group shall not be considered to be an investment company for purposes of the Investment Company Act of 1940 ( et seq.).15 U.S.C. 80a–1

children.heading: State blue sky laws
children.label: c State blue sky laws
children.text: The ownership interests of members in a risk retention group shall not be considered securities for purposes of any State blue sky law.
